purposeStrings.NSCameraUsageDescription: Fedi ikenera kwinjira kuri kamera kugira ngo isikane kode za QR
purposeStrings.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Fedi ikenera kwinjira kuri mikoro yawe kugira ngo yandike videwo y'ubwiherero rusange
purposeStrings.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Fedi ikenera uburenganzira bwo kubika amafoto mu isomero ry'amafoto yawe
purposeStrings.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Fedi ikenera kwinjira mu isomero ry'amafoto yawe kugira ngo uhitemo amashusho ya avatar yawe n'umugereka mu biganiro

errors.actions-require-internet: Nturi kumurongo. Ibikorwa bimwe bisaba umurongo wa enterineti.
errors.admin-promotion-pending-multispend: Ntushobora kuzamura abagize itsinda kubayobozi mugihe ubutumire bwa Multispend burimo gukorwa.
errors.bad-connection: Umuyoboro wawe ushobora kuba udahamye. Nyamuneka ongera ugerageze nyuma cyangwa wihuze ku wundi muyoboro.
errors.chat-connection-unhealthy: Umuyoboro w'ikiganiro ntuhamye cyangwa uri hanze y'umurongo. Nyamuneka ongera ugerageze nyuma cyangwa wongere ufungure porogaramu.
errors.chat-list-render-error: Hari ikosa rigaragara mu biganiro byawe
errors.chat-message-render-error: Hari ikosa rigaragara muri ubu butumwa
errors.chat-payment-failed: Ntibyashobotse kuvugurura ubwo bwishyu bwo mu kiganiro.
errors.failed-to-list-created-communities: Kunanirwa gushyira ku rutonde imbuga zashinzwe.
errors.failed-to-select-wallet-service: Kunanirwa guhitamo ikigega. Nyamuneka shyiraho mu buryo bw'intoki.
errors.failed-to-update-notification: Kunanirwa kuvugurura igenamiterere ry'imenyesha ry'iki kiganiro
errors.get-nostr-pubkey-failed: Kunanirwa kubona urufunguzo rusange rwa Nostr
errors.history-render-error: Habayeho ikosa mu kwerekana iki kintu
errors.insufficient-balance: Igisigaye nticyihagije. Mu ikotomoni yawe usigaranye gusa {{balance}}
errors.insufficient-balance-send: Igisigaye nticyihagije ku byo wakohereza n'amafaranga asabwa. Ushobora kohereza ntarengwa {{sats}} sats
errors.internet-offline-foreign-ecash: Kunanirwa gucungura eCash. Umuyoboro wawe uri hanze y'umurongo
errors.invalid-username: Igomba kuba ifite inyuguti hagati ya 1 na 21
errors.multispend-cannot-be-broadcast: Amatsinda yo Gukoresha Rusange ntashobora kuba ay'Itangaza-gusa.
errors.multispend-notes-required: Nyamuneka andika intego yo gukuramo amafaranga
errors.network-connection-failed: Ntibishoboka guhuza. Gerageza guhinduranya Wi-Fi na telefoni cyangwa uhagarike VPN yawe.
errors.no-address-lnurlp: Iyi aderesi ntishyigikira kwishyura kuri Inkuba
errors.no-lightning-gateways: Nta marembo y'Inkuba abonetse kuri uyu mukoresha
errors.please-force-quit-the-app: Habayeho ikosa, nyamuneka funga porogaramu mu buryo bw'agahato hanyuma wongere ugerageze
errors.please-grant-permission: Nyamuneka tanga uruhushya rwo gukuramo iyi dosiye
errors.please-join-a-federation: Nyamuneka winjire mu kigega mbere yo kwishyura mu biganiro
errors.please-join-wallet-federation: Nyamuneka winjire mu kigega mbere yo kwishyura
errors.please-select-balance-federation: Nyamuneka hitamo ikotomoni ifite amafaranga yo kwishyura.
errors.receive-ecash-failed-claimed: Kunanirwa kwakira eCash. Iyi eCash yamaze gusabwa
errors.receives-have-been-disabled: Kwakira amafaranga muri iki kigega byarahagaritswe
errors.recovery-failed-connection: Igaruza ryanze kubera ikibazo cy'uhuza wawe
errors.unknown-ecash-issuer: Iki kimenyetso cya eCash cyatanzwe n'ikigega utari umunyamuryango wacyo
errors.unknown-stability-address: Iyi aderesi ni iy'ikigega utari umunyamuryango wacyo
errors.update-fedi: Nyamuneka vugurura porogaramu ya Fedi ku verisiyo igezweho kugira ngo ukoreshe igikoresho cyo gukora urubuga
errors.web-no-modification-allowed-error: Nyamuneka reba neza ko porogaramu idafunguye mu ma tabu abiri cyangwa menshi atandukanye.
errors.you-have-already-joined: Usanzwe warinjiye muri uru rubuga/iki kigega

backup.beta-backup: Igikorwa cya Beta - kora ubwiherero bwihariye nabwo
backup.camera-access-information: Kugira ngo ukore ubwiherero rusange, uzakenera kwemerera Fedi gukoresha kamera yawe kugira ngo yandike videwo y'ihamya
backup.choose-method-instructions: Kubika ikotomoni yawe bizagufasha kugarura amafaranga yawe niba wabura uburenganzira ku Fedi
backup.cloud-backup-instructions: Kora ubwiherero bw'idosiye yawe y'igaruza ku ububiko bwa cloud. Uzanasabwa kubika iyi dosiye ku nshuti zawe ebyiri cyangwa ku banyamuryango b'umuryango wawe.
backup.complete-backup-save-file-help: Urugero, drive ihishe, USB, cyangwa ububiko bw'ibicu butekanye. Wirinde kuyisangiza muri porogaramu rusange cyangwa zitizewe.
backup.confirm-video-text: Genzura neza ko isura yawe n'ijwi ryawe bisobanutse muri videwo. Ibi bifasha abarinzi bawe kwemeza ko ari wowe koko.
backup.creating-recovery-file: Gushyira videwo yawe muri dosiye y'ubwiherero bwizewe bwa Fedi. Wowe gusa n'abarinzi bawe ni mwe mushobora kuyigeraho mu gihe cyo kugarurwa.
backup.hold-record-button: Ba ufatiye ho buto yo gufata hanyuma uvuge:
backup.personal-backup-description: Bika ubu kugira ngo ushobore kugarura amafaranga, ibiganiro, n'amakuru y'ingenzi niba igikoresho cyawe cyatakaye, cyasimbuwe, cyangwa porogaramu yongeye gushyirwaho.
backup.personal-backup-instructions: Andika amagambo 12 y'igaruza. Ibi ni iby'abanyamuryango bafite ubunararibonye.
backup.personal-backup-warning-line-1: Wowe wenyine ufite uburenganzira ku bwiherero bwawe.
backup.press-record-button: Kanda buto yo gufata hanyuma uvuge:
backup.record-video-press-stop-text: Kanda rimwe kugira ngo uhagarike gufata amajwi
backup.record-video-press-text: Kanda rimwe kugira ngo ufate amajwi
backup.record-video-tip: Menya neza ko isura yawe igaragara neza kandi ifite urumuri rwiza.
backup.recovery-words-instructions: Andika aya magambo ku rupapuro ukoresheje ikaramu. Ntubike aya magambo mu buryo bw'ikoranabuhanga ku gikoresho cyawe.
backup.review-face-confirmation: Ndemeza ko mu maso hanjye hagaragara neza muri iyi videwo
backup.review-voice-confirmation: Ndemeza ko ijwi ryanjye ryumvikana neza muri iyi videwo
backup.save-your-wallet-backup-file-again: Ongera uyibike na none ahandi hantu
backup.save-your-wallet-backup-file-where: Turagusaba kubika idosiye yawe ahantu hatandukanye (porogaramu z'ubutumwa, imeri, ububiko bwa cloud, n'ibindi).
backup.social-backup-instructions: Fata videwo mu guhamya ko ari wowe. Iyi nzira ni nziza iyo uzi neza abarinzi bawe.
backup.social-backup-warning: ⚠️ Koresha iyi mikorere gusa niba uzi abarinzi bawe ku giti cyawe.
backup.start-personal-backup-instructions: Fata ikaramu n'urupapuro maze wandike amagambo y'igaruza azaza ku rundi rupapuro.
backup.start-social-backup-desc: Andika videwo ngufi kugira ngo abarinzi bawe bagufashe kugarura konti yawe nibiba ngombwa. Bazayibona gusa igihe uzabasaba.
backup.start-social-backup-instructions: Videwo yawe izahindurwa idosiye y'ubwiherero y'ikotomoni yawe yihariye. Abarinzi bashobora kuyibona gusa igihe usabye kugarura ikotomoni yawe.
backup.start-social-backup-permissions-text: Kugira ngo ufate videwo y'ubwiherero rusange, ugomba kwemerera kamera na mikoro yawe ku kazi.
backup.start-social-backup-warning: ⚠️ Koresha iyi mikorere gusa niba uzi abarinzi bawe ku giti cyawe.
backup.successfully-backed-up: Wabitse neza ikotomoni yawe ya Fedi
backup.video-file-too-large: Amashusho y'iyi videwo ni manini, nyabuneka fata iri ntoya

bug.description-placeholder: Ni iki wari witeze kandi byagenze bite aho?
bug.info-label: Kohereza Ikigega n'Izina ry'ukoresha hamwe na raporo ya bug

chat.broadcast-admin-instructions: Aba banyamuryango barashobora kohereza ubutumwa mu itsinda ry'Itangaza-gusa
chat.broadcast-no-message: Abayobozi ntibaratangaza ubutumwa kugeza ubu. Komeza utegereje.
chat.broadcast-only-notice: Psst, abayobozi n'abagenzuzi ni bo bonyine bemerewe kohereza ubutumwa hano. 🤫
chat.chat-info-description: Iyo wemeye ikiganiro, kiba urubuga rwo kohererezanya ubutumwa n'amafaranga. Ushobora kohereza no kwakira Bitcoin n'Amafaranga Ahamye ya USD mu kiganiro.
chat.chat-info-note: <bold>Icyitonderwa:</bold> Amafaranga Ahamye ashyira imbere korohereza abantu kuruta ibanga ryuzuye. ID yawe y'Amafaranga Ahamye ikomeza kugaragara ku wundi muntu mu kiganiro iyo amaze guhuza nawe.
chat.click-here-for-announcements: Kanda hano kugira ngo urebe amatangazo
chat.community-chat-description: Hitamo kimwe cyangwa byinshi mu biganiro rusange kugira ngo wongere mu rubuga rwawe
chat.confirm-add-to-group: Uzi neza ko ushaka gutumira {{username}} kuri {{roomName}}?
chat.confirm-delete-message: Uzi neza ko ushaka gusiba ubu butumwa?
chat.confirm-end-poll: Uzi neza ko ushaka kurangiza aya matora?
chat.confirm-remove-admin-from-group: Uzi neza ko ushaka gukuraho {{username}} nk'umuyobozi? Ntibazashobora kohereza ubutumwa muri iri tsinda ariko ubutumwa boherereje mbere buzagumaho.
chat.confirm-unblock-user: Uzi neza ko ushaka kureka guhagarika {{username}}?
chat.connection-request-guidance: Kwemera iki kiganiro bizagufasha guhana ubutumwa, Bitcoin, n'Amafaranga Ahamye na <bold>{{username}}</bold>.
chat.create-or-join-public-chat: Kora cyangwa wifatanye n'ikiganiro rusange cy'itsinda muri porogaramu ya Fedi — kugira ngo habeho amatangazo cyangwa ibiganiro bifunguye. Bizagaragara hano kugira ngo ubashe kubyongera mu rubuga rwawe.
chat.first-entry-option-1: Amakuru y'Ikigega n'Urubuga, ibiganiro by'amatsinda, n'ubutumwa bwihariye.
chat.first-entry-option-2: Ohereza kandi wakire amafaranga mu kiganiro nyirizina.
chat.go-to-direct-chat: Genda/injira ku kiganiro kiri ho ubu
chat.invalid-group: Iri si itsinda ry'ukuri ryo kuganirira ho
chat.invalid-member: Uyu si umunyamuryango w'ukuri wo kuganira na we
chat.leave-chat-confirmation: Uzi neza ko ushaka kuva muri iki kiganiro? Amateka y'ubutumwa bwose azabura.
chat.leave-group-confirmation: Uzi neza ko ushaka kuva muri iri tsinda? Amateka y'ubutumwa bwose bw'iri tsinda azabura.
chat.multispend-preview: Iri tsinda rifite ibikorwa bishya byo Gukoresha Rusange
chat.need-registration-description: Shyiraho izina ryawe riza ahagaragara kugira ngo ushobore kohereza no kwakira ku bandi bakoresha.
chat.no-messages: Kugeza ubu nta butumwa buri muri iri tsinda.
chat.no-one-is-in-this-group: Kugeza ubu nta munyamuryango uri muri iri tsinda.
chat.offline-reply-error-1: Nyamuneka tegereza ko ubutumwa bwoherezwa mbere yo kubusubiza
chat.offline-reply-error-2: Ibisubizo ntibiboneka kumurongo. Nyamuneka tegereza kugeza ugarutse kumurongo.
chat.only-admins-can-vote: Abayobozi gusa ni bo bashobora gutora
chat.public-group-notice: Iri ni itsinda rya rubanda. Abanyamuryango n'ubutumwa biragaragara ku mugaragaro.
chat.public-group-warning: Ubutumwa n'abanyamuryango bose mu itsinda rusange biragaragara ku wese. Komeza witonze.
chat.scan-member-code-notice: Erekana QR kugirango dusangire izina ukoresha
chat.search-chats-list-guidance: Shakisha amazina y'abakoresha mu butumwa butaziguye n'amazina y'amatsinda mu biganiro by'amatsinda.
chat.search-chats-list-no-results: Urashobora gushakisha gusa amazina y'abakoresha mu butumwa butaziguye n'amazina y'amatsinda mu biganiro byawe by'amatsinda.
chat.search-chats-list-placeholder: Shakisha izina ry'ukoresha cyangwa izina ry'itsinda
chat.select-or-start: Hitamo ikiganiro cyangwa utangize ikindi gishya
chat.sp-transfer-preview: Habayeho igikorwa gishya cyo kohereza Amafaranga Ahamye
chat.type-to-search-members: Andika gushakisha abanyamuryango muri iri tsinda
chat.upgrade-chat-guidance: Twakoze ku buryo ibiganiro bya Fedi biba bifite umutekano kandi bikoreshwa n'abantu bari mu bigega bitandukanye
chat.upgrade-chat-item-subtitle-1: Vugana n'uwo ari we wese muri Fedi
chat.user-is-blocked-guidance: Uyu mukoresha yarahagaritswe. Bumwe mu butumwa bwe bushobora kutagaragara.

communities.autojoined-community-notice: Federasiyo n'Urubuga ubu biratandukanye. Kugira ngo ucunge amafaranga, <federationLink>jya kuri federasiyo yawe</federationLink>.
communities.autojoined-community-notice-federation: Federasiyo n'Urubuga ubu biratandukanye. <communityLink>Shaka urubuga rwawe hano</communityLink>.
communities.create-info-1: Koranya ubwoko bwawe. Sangira serivisi. Komeza guhuza.
communities.create-info-2: Urubuga rwo kuvuga mu bwisanzure, kubaza ibibazo, no gukora gahunda.
communities.create-info-3: Koresha Miniapps kugirango uzane serivisi abanyamuryango bakeneye.
communities.guidance-discover: Tangira ahantu uhuza, ibiganiro, na serivisi zisangiwe.
communities.guidance-join: Sikana cyangwa wandike kode y'ubutumire kugira ngo ufungure kwinjira mu rubuga.
communities.leave-community-description: Uzi neza ko ushaka kuva muri uru rubuga? Urashobora kongera kwinjira nyuma.
communities.onboarding-title: Umwanya wawe wa Digital Town Square

developer.default-groups-info: Kurema kumugaragaro, gutangaza-gusa itsinda kugirango rigizwe nkitsinda risanzwe abakoresha bifatanya mu buryo bwikora
developer.select-federation-share-logs: Hitamo ikigega cyo gusangira amakuru kivuyemo

ecash.adding-to-existing-wallet: Iyi eCash izongerwa mu kotomoni yawe ya {{federation_name}}.
ecash.adding-to-new-wallet: Iyo usabye eCash yawe tuzagukorera ikotomoni nshya ya {{federation_name}} kuko utarayifite.
ecash.claim-ecash-description: Kanda kuri buto iri hepfo kugira ngo usabe eCash yawe
ecash.claim-ecash-success-description: Wabashije neza gusaba eCash yawe. Kanda kuri buto iri hepfo kugira ngo urebe ikotomoni yawe.
ecash.invalid-ecash-token-description: Token yawe ya eCash ntiyemewe kandi ntishobora kucungurwa.
ecash.terms-link: Nyamuneka soma kandi wemere amasezerano y'ikigega mbere yo gusaba eCash yawe: {{tos_url}}
ecash.terms-link-web: Nyamuneka soma kandi wemere amasezerano ya serivisi y'ikigega mbere yo gusaba eCash yawe: <url />

federation.autojoined-community-notice: Federasiyo n'Urubuga ubu biratandukanye. <communityLink>Shaka urubuga rwawe hano</communityLink>
federation.create-still-loading: G-Bot yawe irashyuha! Garuka vuba cyangwa utegereze muri Chat.
federation.how-was-your-experience-with: Bwagenze gute uburambe bwawe hamwe na {{federation}}?
federation.join-federation-guidance: Injira mu kigega ukunda kugira ngo ubone amafaranga n'ibindi byinshi

federations.connection-status-expired: Iki kigega cyararangiye. Ibikorwa byo kohererezanya ntibikiboneka.
federations.connection-status-offline: Iki kigega ntabwo kiri kumurongo. Nyamuneka wegera abarinzi b'iki kigega cyangwa umuyobozi w'umuryango kugira ngo umenye amakuru.
federations.connection-status-unstable: Iki kigega gifite ibibazo. Nyamuneka wegera abarinzi b'iki kigega cyangwa umuyobozi w'umuryango kugira ngo umenye amakuru.
federations.drawer-subtitle: Ibigega ni urugo rw'ikotomoni yawe, amakuru na serivisi.
federations.expired-message: Iki kigega cyararangiye. Ibikorwa byo kohererezanya ntibikiboneka.
federations.leave-community-confirmation: Uzi neza ko ushaka kuva muri uru rubuga?
federations.leave-federation-confirmation: Uzi neza ko ushaka kuva muri iki kigega?
federations.leave-federation-withdraw-first: Uragomba gukura mo amafaranga yawe mbere ko uvamo
federations.leave-federation-withdraw-pending-stable: Gukura mo {{currency}} yawe biracyakorwa ho. Ongera ugerageze mu minota 10
federations.leave-federation-withdraw-stable-first: Uragomba gukura mo {{currency}} yawe yose asigaye mbere ko uvamo
federations.please-reconnect: Nyamuneka ongera uhuze kuri enterineti kugira ngo uvugurure imiterere y'ikigega.
federations.recover-from-scratch-warning: Icyitonderwa: Ibi bifata igihe kirekire. Ntugomba guhitamo ubu buryo keretse niba warahawe amabwiriza nubufasha bwa Fedi.

fedi.new-release-available: Isohoka rishya rya Fedi App rirahari!
fedi.new-release-description: Twakoranye umwete kugira ngo tuguhe ubunararibonye bwiza. Vugurura porogaramu yawe kugira ngo wishimire ibintu bishya.

fedimods.add-mini-app-failure: Kunanirwa kongera {{miniAppName}} kuri Porogaramu nto zawe.
fedimods.add-mods-homescreen: Ongeraho Porogaramu nto kuri ecran yawe ya Fedi
fedimods.cache-clear: Siba cache ya Porogaramu nto za Fedi
fedimods.cache-clear-info: Yongeraho buto yo gusiba cache kuri mushakisha ya Porogaramu nto za Fedi
fedimods.delete-confirmation: Uzi neza ko ushaka gukuraho {{miniAppName}}? Ushobora kuyongera nyuma.
fedimods.first-entry-option-1: Reba kandi wongeremo Porogaramu nto zigufasha mu buzima bwawe bwa buri munsi.
fedimods.first-entry-option-2: Porogaramu nto wahisemo zonyine ni zo zigaragara hano.
fedimods.leave-page-confirmation: Uremeza ko ushaka kuva kuri iyi paji/ kuri uru rupapuro? Ibyahinduwe bishobora kutabikwa
fedimods.reset-permission-confirmation: Ese wizeye ko ushaka kongera gukoresha uburenganzira bwa {{permissionName}} kuri {{miniAppName}}? Uzongera gusabwa uburenganzira ubutaha.
fedimods.stable-balance-enabled-info: Iha ububasha bwo guhindura SATS mu Mafaranga Ahamye

fees.guidance-ecash: Byiza! Koherereza amafaranga inshuti zo mu kigega cyawe birahendutse kandi biroroshye — kandi biranashimishije😎
fees.guidance-lightning: 🤑Urashaka kubika amafaranga urishye? Ahubwo ohereza mu kiganiro
fees.guidance-onchain: Kohereza on-chain bitcoin bisaba ukuriha ku murongo. By'ukuri
fees.guidance-stable-balance: Aya ni yo mafaranga menshi washobora kwishyura kugira ngo ubashe kugumana ikinyuranyo umwaka wose. Ashobora no kuba make! 😉

gbot.guardian-fee-rate-update-proposed:
⏳ Gusaba ko hahindurwa Igipimo cy'amafaranga y'umurinzi ku barinzi bawe...

Nyamuneka tegereza mu gihe ikigega kigera ku bwumvikane kuri iyi mpinduka.
gbot.guardian-fees-ask-custom-rate:
⚙️ Hindura igipimo cy'amafaranga y'umurinzi %

Shyiramo igipimo cy'amafaranga y'umurinzi cyihariye kiri hagati ya 0% na 10%.

Ingero: 0.25%, 1%, 2.5%
gbot.guardian-fees-sync-in-progress:
⏳ Guhuza Amafaranga y'Umurinzi...

Menyu y'Amafaranga y'Umurinzi izifungura mu buryo bwikora iyo byemejwe.
gbot.guardian-fees-view-dashboard: 📊 Reba ububiko bw'amakuru (dashboard) hanyuma utange amafaranga yo kubikuza amafaranga
gbot.invalid-guardian-fee-rate: Igipimo cy'amafaranga y'umurinzi kitemewe. Hitamo kimwe mu bihari cyangwa wandike ijanisha riri hagati ya 0% na 10%.

home.backup-wallet-description: Igihe kirageze cyo kubika amagambo yawe y'igaruza kugira ngo amafaranga yawe abe mu mutekano.
home.mobile-app-download-description: Kuramo porogaramu igendanwa kavukire kuburambe bwiza bwa Fedi.
home.profile-change-icon: Kugira ngo uhindure, kanda menu y'umwirondoro <icon />.
home.pwa-install-banner-description: Shyira Fedi nka porogaramu kuri ecran yawe y'urugo.

multispend.abort-group-message: Igenamiterere ry'itsinda ryo Gukoresha Rusange rizahagarikwa, ubutumire bwose butegereje buzasibwa, kandi uzakenera gutangira gushyiraho kuva mu ntangiriro.
multispend.already-voted: Wamaze gutora kuri iki cyifuzo cyo gukuramo
multispend.approval-threshold-description: Shyiraho umubare w'abantu bakeneye kwemeza mbere y'uko umunyamuryango ashobora gukuramo amafaranga.
multispend.approval-threshold-max-members: Umupaka wo kwemeza ntushobora kurenza umubare w'abatora
multispend.assign-voters-description: Hitamo abazatora ku byo amafaranga ashobora gukurwa.

chat-events.invitation-body1: ashaka kuzamura iki kiganiro mu Itsinda ryo Gukoresha Rusange:
chat-events.invitation-body2-proposer: ⚠️ Kwibutsa: Hura n'abatora bawe kugira ngo wirinde ibibazo.

multispend.incomplete-notice: ℹ️ Itsinda ryo Gukoresha Rusange rizatangira gukora abatora bose batumiwe bamaze kwemera ubutumire.
multispend.intro-1: <bold>Bika Igihe Cyose</bold>: Umunyamuryango wese arashobora gutanga umusanzu mu kigega gisangiwe.
multispend.intro-2: <bold>Saba Kubikuza</bold>: Ukeneye gukuramo amafaranga? Ohereza icyifuzo cyo kwemererwa.
multispend.intro-3: <bold>Igenzura ry'Umuyobozi</bold>: Abayobozi barashobora gusubukura ubutumire cyangwa guhagarika ishyirwaho mbere y'uko byemezwa byuzuye.
multispend.intro-4: <bold>Bisobanutse Kandi Bigaragara</bold>: Igikorwa cyose kirakurikiranwa kugira ngo itsinda rikomeze kumenyeshwa.
multispend.intro-5: <bold>Hakenewe Icyemezo Cyuzuye</bold>: Abatora bose bagomba kwemera ubutumire kugira ngo Itsinda ryo Gukoresha Rusange ryemezwe.
multispend.join-federation-notice: Kugira ngo wemeze ubu butumire bwo gukoresha rusange, ugomba kwinjira mu kigega cya {{federation}}.
multispend.leave-group-message: Ntushobora kuva mu itsinda ryo Gukoresha Rusange niba uri umutora cyangwa umuyobozi
multispend.multispend-title: <bold>Gukoresha Rusange</bold>: Inzira yoroshye yo gucunga amafaranga asangiwe
multispend.multispend-unavailable-description: Igikorwa cyo Gukoresha Rusange nticyaratangiriwe muri iri tsinda
multispend.no-permission-to-vote: Ntabwo ufite uburenganzira bwo gutora kubisabwa gukuramo amafaranga.
multispend.no-requests-notice: Bika amafaranga kugira ngo ukure ikigega gisangiwe cyangwa usabe kubikuza niba ukeneye amafaranga.
multispend.reject-invite-message: Uzi neza ko ushaka kwanga ubu butumire bwo Gukoresha Rusange?
multispend.topup-stable-balance: Bibikwa bivuye mu Mafaranga Ahamye yawe. Ingano winjije irenze ayo ufite. Nyamuneka ongeraho amafaranga kugira ngo ukomeze.
multispend.two-voters-required: Nibura abatora 2 barakenewe kugira ngo hashyirweho itsinda ryo Gukoresha Rusange
multispend.wallet-federation-description: Amafaranga y'itsinda ryanyu ahujwe n'ikigega. Ukeneye ibi kugira ngo wohereze cyangwa wakire amafaranga.

omni.camera-permission-denied: Jya ku igenamiterere uhindure uburenganzira bwa kamera.
omni.camera-permission-request: Emerera kamera ku kazi kugira ngo isikane.
omni.confirm-cashu-token: Iyi ni token ya Cashu, urashaka kuyicungura ukoresheje Inkuba?
omni.confirm-community-invite: Ubu ni ubutumire bw'urubuga, urashaka kwinjiramo?
omni.confirm-deeplink-url: Iyi ni deeplink ya Fedi, urashaka kuyifungura?
omni.confirm-ecash-token: Iyi ni token ya eCash, urashaka kuyicungura?
omni.confirm-federation-invite: Ubu ni ubutumire bw'ikigega, urashaka kwinjiramo?
omni.confirm-fedi-chat: Iyi ni ikiganiro cyo kuganira kuri {{username}}, urashaka kujyayo?
omni.confirm-fedi-chat-group-invite: Ubu ni ubutumire bwitsinda ryibiganiro, urashaka kwinjiramo?
omni.confirm-fedimint-guardian: Iyi ni kode yo kwemeza umurinzi, urashaka gukomeza?
omni.confirm-fedimint-recovery: Iyi ni kode y'igaruza kandi ikwiye gusikanwa mu gihe cyo gukora igaruza rusange.
omni.confirm-lightning-pay: Iki ni icyifuzo cyo kwishyura kuri Inkuba, urashaka kucyishyura?
omni.confirm-lightning-withdraw: Iki ni ukubikuza kuri Inkuba, urashaka kubikuza?
omni.confirm-melt-cashu: Ohereza Cashu eCash mu Kotomoni yawe ya Fedi (amafaranga ya Inkuba akurwaho)
omni.confirm-onchain-pay: Iki ni ubwishyu bwa bitcoin bwa On-chain, urashaka kubwishyura?
omni.confirm-stability-address: Iyi ni aderesi y'Amafaranga Ahamye, urashaka kuyishyura?
omni.confirm-website-url: Iyi ni URL y'urubuga rwa interineti, urashaka kuyifungura muri mushakisha yawe?
omni.error-network-message: Nyamuneka ongera ugerageze iyo umuyoboro uhari
omni.error-network-title: Ikosa ry'umuyoboro, nyamuneka ongera ugerageze ufite uhuza
omni.error-paste-empty: Nta kintu cyari mu maboko cyo gufatisha.
omni.first-time-overlay-desc1: Sikana ikintu icyo ari cyo cyose — ohereza cyangwa wakire amafaranga, tangira ibiganiro bishya, cyangwa wongereho Porogaramu nto. Sikana yawe ya buri kintu cya Fedi.
omni.first-time-overlay-desc2: Ntushobora gusikana? Nta mpungenge. Urashobora gushira kode aho.
omni.search-placeholder-username-or-ln: Andika izina ry'ukoresha cyangwa aderesi ya Inkuba
omni.unsupported-chat-invite: Iyi ni kode y'icyumba cy'ikiganiro. Izina ry'ukoresha rigomba gutumirwa mu cyumba cy'ikiganiro mbere yo kwinjira.
omni.unsupported-legacy-chat: Iki kiganiro QR kivuye muri verisiyo ya porogaramu itagishyigikiwe. Ihangane!
omni.unsupported-no-federation: Ntushobora kuyikoresha mbere y'uko winjira mu kigega. Ahubwo gerageza gusikana ubutumire bw'ikigega
omni.unsupported-on-chain: Aderesi za bitcoin za On-chain ntizirashyigikirwa. Ihangane!
omni.unsupported-unknown: Hmm, ubu si bwo buryo tuzi. Ihangane!

onboarding.agree-terms-privacy:
Mu gukomeza, wemera
<termsLink>Amasezerano yo gukoresha</termsLink> & <privacyLink>Politiki y'ibanga</privacyLink>.
onboarding.by-clicking-i-accept: Ukanze 'Ndemeye' wemera amategeko ya serivisi kuri {{tos_url}}
onboarding.by-clicking-you-agree-user-agreement:
Mu gukomeza, wemera
<anchor>Amasezerano yo gukoresha</anchor> & <anchor>Politiki y'ibanga</anchor>
onboarding.create-info-1: Ikigega kiyoborwa n'abantu bizewe bita abarinzi.
onboarding.create-info-2: Abarinzi bakorera hamwe kugira ngo ikigega kigire umutekano.
onboarding.create-info-3: Ubu bufatanye burinda ikotomoni yawe, ubuzima bwite, kandi bukomeza Ikigega cyawe.
onboarding.create-info-4: Urashobora gushiraho ikigega cyaba rusange (gifunguye ku bantu bose) cyangwa cyihariye (cy'abatumiwe gusa).
onboarding.create-info-5: Serivisi ya G-Bot ya Fedi yorohereza gushinga ikigega cyawe ukoresheje Ikiganiro.
onboarding.description: Ibigega bishyigikira amakotomoni yawe bwite. Tangira ukoresheje ibigega bifunguye.
onboarding.description-create: Tangira ikigega cyawe mu buryo bworoshye kandi bwihuse. Amafaranga arasabwa.
onboarding.description-create-community: Tangira ahantu ho guhuzwa, ibiganiro, na serivisi zisangiwe.
onboarding.description-join: Sikana cyangwa wandike kode y'ubutumire kugira ngo ufungure kwinjira mu kigega cyihariye cyangwa rusange.
onboarding.empower-tagline: Kongerera ubushobozi ikiremwamuntu ukoresheje ikoranabuhanga ry'ubwisanzure
onboarding.greeting-instructions: Ubu uzashobora kohereza amafaranga, kuvugana n'urubuga rwawe, n'ibindi byinshi ukoresheje Fedi
onboarding.guidance-1: Ikigega kiyoborwa n'abantu bizewe bita abarinzi.
onboarding.guidance-2: Abarinzi bakorera hamwe kugira ngo ikigega kigire umutekano.
onboarding.guidance-3: Ubu bufatanye burinda ikotomoni yawe, ubuzima bwite, kandi bigatuma urubuga rwawe rukomera.
onboarding.guidance-public-federations: Gerageza ikigega kivuye ku rutonde rwa Awesome Fedimint
onboarding.heading: Injira cyangwa Shiraho Ikigega
onboarding.landing-page-modal-description: Nyuma yo gukuramo, garuka kuri uru rubuga.
onboarding.landing-page-step-1-description: Ku buntu kuri iOS na Android.
onboarding.landing-page-step-2-description: Kanda hano kugira ngo ufungure iyi link muri Fedi.
onboarding.landing-page-title: Kurikiza izi ntambwe kugira ngo ufungure umuyoboro wawe wa Fedi:
onboarding.network-error: Nyamuneka wemeze ko uri kumurongo kugirango ukomeze
onboarding.new-users-disabled-notice: Ihangane, iki kigega ntikiremera abakoresha bashya
onboarding.one-time-modal-option-1: Ongeramo amafaranga mu kotomoni yawe kugira ngo wohereze, wakire, kandi uzigame.
onboarding.one-time-modal-option-2: Injira mu bigega byinshi kandi ushyire amafaranga yawe mu makotomoni atandukanye.
onboarding.tagline:
Ibiganiro, amafaranga na Porogaramu nto.
Bifashwe n'urubuga.
onboarding.terms-url: Ukanze 'Ndemeye' wemera amasezerano ya serivisi kuri <url />
onboarding.title: Hitamo Ikigega
onboarding.username-instructions: Izina ry'ukoresha ni uburyo abandi banyamuryango bazakumenyaho.
onboarding.welcome-instructions-new: Nk'umunyamuryango mushya w'ikigega, uzahabwa ikotomoni nshya.
onboarding.welcome-instructions-returning: Nk'umunyamuryango wagarutse mu kigega, ikotomoni yawe izagarurwa. Ibi birashobora gufata iminota mike.
onboarding.welcome-instructions-unknown: Abanyamuryango bashya bahabwa ikotomoni nshya. Abanyamuryango bagaruka bazasubizwa ikotomoni yabo ya kera mu buryo bwikora.

parser.unsupported-bolt11-zero-amount: Inyemezabwishyu za Inkuba zidafite ingano ntizishyigikiwe. Kora inyemezabwishyu nshya ifite ingano hanyuma ongera ugerageze.

permissions.allow-camera-description: Sikana kode za QR, amazina y'abakoresha mu biganiro, ohereza amafaranga, n'ibindi
permissions.allow-storage-description: Ohereza dosiye, shiraho ishusho yawe, nibindi byinshi
permissions.navigation-description: Yikora ibikorwa kuri Fedi mu izina ryawe
permissions.navigation-display-name: Uburyo bwo kugenzura porogaramu ya Fedi

pin.backup-notice: Niwibagirwa PIN yawe, ubwiherero bwawe ni bwo nzira yonyine yo gusubiranya uburenganzira ku mafaranga yawe n'ibiganiro byawe.
pin.recovery-notice: Niba wibagiwe PIN yawe, ushobora kugarura uburenganzira bwo kwinjira muri Fedi ukoresheje ubwiherero bwawe maze ukore PIN nshya.

popup.ending-description: Iki kigega cy'igihe gito <bold>kizarangira ku {{date}}</bold>. Amafaranga asigaye azacungwa ku bushake bw'abarinzi.

quick-fact.fact-1: Urashobora kwinjira mu bigega byinshi uko ubishaka. Buri kigega kiguha ikotomoni nshya yihariye.
quick-fact.title: Amakuru y'ibanze

receive.balance-not-spendable-offline: Iki gisigaye nticyashobora gukoreshwa kugeza igihe uzagarukira ku murongo
receive.claim-ecash-online: Garuka ku murongo kugira ngo uyisabe
receive.lnurl-receive-notice-1: Kode Ihoraho yo Kwishyura kuri Inkuba
receive.lnurl-receive-notice-2: Nibyiza ku maduka, abahanga, cyangwa abafatanyabikorwa b'urubuga. Sangiza rimwe gusa kandi uhembwe inshuro nyinshi.
receive.no-incoming-funds-detected: Nta mafaranga yinjira yagaragaye. Nyamuneka ongera ugerageze nyuma.
receive.onchain-expert-only: Ku mutekano wawe: Gumana ingano y'ihererekanya munsi ya 40 kB kandi NTUKONGERE GUKORESHA iyi aderesi mu gihe kizaza. Ibi bizafasha gukumira ibibazo bishobora kuvuka ku kubika kwawe.
receive.payment-received-pending-subtext: Garuka ku murongo kugira ngo wemeze.
receive.receive-guidance-subtitle-1: Amafaranga arashobora gufata amasaha menshi kugirango agere.
receive.send-a-lightning-request: Ohereza icyifuzo cyo kwishyura kuri Inkuba kuri {{username}}

recovery.camera-access-information: Kugira ngo ufashe mu igaruza, uzakenera kwemerera Fedi gukoresha kamera yawe kugira ngo isikane kode y'igaruza rusange
recovery.choose-method-instructions: Hitamo uburyo ushaka kugarura konti yawe:
recovery.complete-social-recovery-description: Sangiza iyi kode abarinzi bawe kugira ngo bemeze umwirondoro wawe.
recovery.continue-recovery-description: Igaruza rizatwara igihe gito kurenza uko twari tubyiteze. Murakoze kwihangana.
recovery.create-new-wallet-guidance: Iyi kotomoni izashobora gukoreshwa gusa kuri iki cyuma, keretse igaruwe maze ukoyimurira ku kindi cyuma
recovery.device-not-found-description: Aya magambo y'igaruza ashobora kuba yaraturutse mu ikotomoni itari iya Fedi.
recovery.from-different-device: Kuva ku cyuma gitandukanye ujya kuri kino
recovery.guardian-approval-instructions: Abarinzi bakeneye kwemeza ko ari wowe ugaragara muri videwo ya Fedi kugira ngo bagaruze amafaranga yawe
recovery.guardian-qr-instructions: Abarinzi bazakenera gusikana iyi kode ya QR mu gutangira gukora igaruza rusange
recovery.locate-social-recovery-instructions: Shaka idosiye wabitse ubwo wakoraga Ubwiherero rusange bwawe. Urugero, ishobora kuba iri muri drive ihishe, USB, cyangwa ububiko bw'ibicu butekanye.
recovery.locate-social-recovery-instructions-1: Ushobora kuba warasangije inshuti zawe iyi dosiye cyangwa warayibitse ahantu hatandukanye:
recovery.locate-social-recovery-instructions-3: Izina rya dosiye ya Fedi rigaragara nka:
recovery.locked-device-guidance-1: Ikotomoni iri kuri iki cyuma yamuriwe ku kindi cyuma
recovery.locked-device-guidance-3: Niba wifuza gushyiraho ikotomoni indi kuri iki cyuma, nyamuneka siba Fedi maze uyongere ushyireho 👍
recovery.migrated-device-guidance-1: Fedi ishobora gukoreshwa kuri telefoni imwe gusa mu gihe kimwe. Kugira ngo wimurire amafaranga, ibiganiro, n'amakuru y'ingenzi hano mu mutekano:
recovery.migrated-device-guidance-3: 2️⃣ Kura Fedi kuri iyi telefoni hanyuma uyishyireho bundi bushya
recovery.migrated-device-guidance-4: ⚠️ Banza ubike kugira ngo utabura uburenganzira ku mafaranga yawe!
recovery.migrated-device-success-guidance-2:
Noneho, kura Fedi kuri iyi telefoni hanyuma uyongere uyishyireho.

 Ibuka gukoresha amagambo wabitse kugira ngo ugarure amafaranga, ibiganiro, n'amakuru y'ingenzi.
recovery.migrated-device-success-guidance-3: Niba ukeneye ubufasha, <anchor>kanda hano</anchor> kugira ngo uhamagare ikipe yacu y'ubufasha
recovery.nothing-to-download: Nta kintu cyo gukurura kivuye ku murinzi
recovery.opening-backup-file-failed-instructions: Idosiye y'ubwiherero {{fileName}} ntiyashoboye gufunguka. Nyamuneka gerageza ugarure ukoresheje indi muri ahantu wabitse.
recovery.personal-recovery-instructions: Andika amagambo 12 wanditse ubwo wakoraga ubwiherero bwawe bwa mbere
recovery.personal-recovery-method: Niba warabitse amagambo 12 y'igaruza, yandike kugira ngo ugarure konti yawe.
recovery.recovery-assist-confirm-question: Ese umuntu uri muri iyi videwo ni we munyamuryango umwe usaba igaruza?
recovery.recovery-assist-confirmation-error: Igisubizo cyawe gifasha kurinda konti. Umunyamuryango ashobora kugarurwa gusa iyo abarinzi batatu babyemeje.
recovery.recovery-assist-confirmation-success: Icyemezo cyawe gishyigikira ukugarurwa. Abandi barinzi baracyakeneye gusuzuma.
recovery.recovery-assist-description: Umunyamuryango w'ikigega cyawe arasaba ubufasha bwo kugaruza ikotomoni ye
recovery.recovery-assist-error-message: Ubusabe ntibwashoboye kurangira. Nyamuneka ongera ugerageze.
recovery.recovery-assist-hold-to-confirm: Kanda hanyuma ukomeze kugira ngo wemeze amahitamo yawe
recovery.recovery-assist-scan-subtitle: Sikana cyangwa fatisha kode y'igaruza y'umukoresha kugira ngo urebe videwo ye y'ubwiherero.
recovery.recovery-assist-step-1: Sikana cyangwa fatisha kode y'igaruza y'umukoresha.
recovery.recovery-assist-subtitle: Kurikiza izi ntambwe kugira ngo wemeze umwirondoro w'umunyamuryango kandi wemeze ubusabe bwe bwo kugaruza amafaranga.
recovery.recovery-assist-thank-you: Murakoze kuba mwafashije umunyamuryango w'ikigega kugarurirwa amafaranga ye
recovery.recovery-confirm-identity-instructions-1: Reba iyi videwo wemeze umwirondoro w'umunyamuryango
recovery.recovery-confirm-identity-instructions-2: Ese iyi videwo yerekana umunyamuryango umwe ugerageza gukora igaruza rusange ubu?
recovery.recovery-in-progress-balance: Igaruza riracyakorwa. Amafaranga yawe asigaye azaboneka vuba.
recovery.recovery-in-progress-chat-payments: Igaruza riracyakorwa. Kwishyura mu biganiro bizaboneka vuba.
recovery.recovery-in-progress-wallet: Igaruza riracyakorwa. Ikotomoni yawe izaboneka vuba.
recovery.select-a-device-guidance: Hitamo igikoresho cyo kwimuriraho ikotomoni iriho.
recovery.social-recovery-instructions: Fungura idosiye yawe ya Fedi y'igaruza rusange yakozwe ubwo wafataga videwo y'ubwiherero. Twakwasabye kubika idosiye no kuyisangiza inshuti.
recovery.social-recovery-method: Niba wafashe videwo, saba abarinzi bawe kwemeza umwirondoro wawe.
recovery.social-recovery-unsuccessful-instruction: Gerageza kongera kugana abarinzi kandi ugaragaze umwirondoro wawe
recovery.successfully-opened-fedi-file: Dosiye yawe yo muri Fedi yafunguwe neza
recovery.transfer-existing-wallet-guidance-1: Iki kizazana ikotomoni yawe ihari kuri iki cyuma maze gifunge ikotomoni iri ku kindi cyuma
recovery.transfer-existing-wallet-guidance-2: Ntukeneye igikoresho cya kera mu kwimura.
recovery.wallet-moved-desc: Ubu irakora ku kindi gikoresho. Kugira ngo ushyireho ikotomoni nshya hano, ongera ushyireho Fedi.

send.cancel-notes-warning: Uzi neza ko ushaka guhagarika kohereza eCash?
send.ecash-recipient-notice: Uwakira agomba kuza ku murongo kugira ngo asabe eCash. Guhagarika Iyoherezwa bizabuza gusaba eCash.
send.enter-a-bitcoin-address: Andika aderesi ya Bitcoin iri ku rufunzo
send.offline-send-warning: Ku rwego rukurikira, iyo QR igaragaye, sats izakurwa mu kotomoni yawe
send.transferred-description: azagera mu kotomoni y'Amafaranga Ahamye y'uwakira vuba aha.

currency-names.pen: Ifaranga rya Peru ryitwa Peruvian Nuevo Sol
currency-names.uyu: Ifaranga ryo muri Uruguay ryitwa Peso
currency-names.ves: ifaranga ryo muri Boliviya ryitwa Bolivares
currency-names.zar: Ifaranga rya Afurika y'Epfo ryitwa Randa

settings.repair-wallet-confirmation: Uzi neza ko ushaka gusana ikotomoni yawe? Kora ibi GUSA niba ubisabwe n'Inama ya Fedi.
settings.repair-wallet-description: Ntukoreshe iki gikoresho keretse ubisabwe n'Inama ya Fedi.

stabilitypool.amount-may-vary-during-withdraw: Umubare ushobora guhinduka mu gihe cyo kubikuza
stabilitypool.deposit-success-description: azagera mu kotomoni yawe y'Amafaranga Ahamye ya USD vuba.
stabilitypool.deposits-disabled-by-federation: Kubitsa mu Mafaranga Ahamye byahagaritswe n'ikigega
stabilitypool.from-my-btc-wallet: Kuva mu kotomoni yanjye ya BTC
stabilitypool.info-description: Shyira Bitcoin yawe hano kugira ngo igumane agaciro kayo muri USD. Iyo uyisubije, uzabona ayo mafaranga angana na USD, nubwo igiciro cya Bitcoin cyaba cyarahindutse.
stabilitypool.max-stable-balance-amount: Ingano ntarengwa y'Amafaranga Ahamye yamaze kugerwaho
stabilitypool.no-bitcoin-notice: Ugomba kugira bitcoin yo kubika ku gisigaye cya {{currency}}
stabilitypool.pending-withdrawal-blocking: Nyamuneka tegereza ko ibyifuzo byo kubikuza biracyategereje birangira mbere yo gukora ibindi byo kubika cyangwa kubikuza
stabilitypool.receive-from-my-btc-wallet: Akira uvuye mu kotomoni ya BTC
stabilitypool.reusable-payment-code-guidance: Sangiza kugira ngo wakire Amafaranga Ahamye ya USD avuye ku bandi bakoresha Fedi.
stabilitypool.withdrawal-to-self: Bikuza ku Kotomoni yanjye ya Bitcoin

support.analytics-consent-description: Mudufashe gukora Fedi neza mugusangira imikoreshereze rusange ya porogaramu. Nta makuru yihariye. Kuramo igihe icyo ari cyo cyose.
support.effective-support-1b: kugira ngo tubashe kuguha ubufasha bwiza bushoboka.
support.effective-support-2a: Ntushaka gusangiza? Nta kibazo! Ushobora gukomeza gusura
support.enter-ticket-number: Andika nimero ya ticket watanzwe n'itsinda ryacu.
support.how-to-launch: Niba ukeneye ubufasha, urashobora gutangiza ikiganiro cyo kugoboka ukanze buto hepfo.
support.log-disclaimer: Ntugakoreshe iyi fomu keretse ubisabwe n’Inama ya Fedi. Banza utange ikibazo <anchor>aha</anchor>.
support.title: Baza Fedi
support.zendesk-initialization-failed: Ntabwo twashoboye kugera ku kiganiro cy'ubufasha. Nyamuneka reba uhuza wawe wa interineti hanyuma ugerageze.

wallet.join-federation: Injira mu kigega kugira ngo utangize ikotomoni yawe
wallet.show-fiat-txn-amounts-info: Ingano y'ihererekanya izerekanwa mu ifaranga rya fiat ryatoranyijwe
wallet.wallet-provider-guidance: Iki ni cyo kigega kirinda ikotomoni yawe kandi gikabika amafaranga yawe mu buryo butekanye.
